scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && wasm-bindgen --target bundler --out-dir ../src/wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/inflate_wasm.wasm && rm -f ../src/wasm/inflate_wasm_bg.wasm.d.ts
scripts.build: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm build:wrapper && pnpm build:bundle
